name: Mental health coverage in health insurance
description: User asks if mental health treatment is covered under their health policy

input.message: I am undergoing therapy for depression and anxiety. Can I claim this under my health insurance? Is mental health covered in India?

notes: Mental Healthcare Act 2017 + IRDAI circular mandates mental health coverage at par with physical health. In-patient hospitalization for mental health must be covered. OPD therapy coverage varies by policy. Should be sensitive and supportive in tone.
